page: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-30-lssd is a general-purpose server instance powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. It features 15 physical cores and 30 vCPUs with hyper-threading enabled, providing dedicated CPU allocation. The system is equipped with 120 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per vCPU. Storage is bundled directly with the instance, consisting of two local NVMe SSDs totaling 804 GB of local storage capacity. No GPU accelerators are included.

Benchmark data indicates strong single-core performance, with stress-ng single-core and Geekbench single-core scores placing in the top 25%. Text processing and small-model LLM text generation also demonstrate strong performance. Multi-core execution, database operations, static web serving, and software compilation fall within the average range. However, memory write bandwidth for large uncached blocks is a relative bottleneck, scoring in the bottom 25%, while read-only memory bandwidth remains average.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the instance offers a balanced resource density of compute and memory alongside high-speed local NVMe storage. This configuration is suitable for workloads requiring fast local scratch space or database operations, such as relational databases, web serving, text processing, and moderate multi-threaded compilation tasks.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-standard-30-lssd is an x86_64 general-purpose server powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor. It features 30 vCPUs across 15 physical cores, 120 GB of RAM, and 804 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. Benchmark results show strong single-core CPU performance and memory scores, alongside average multi-core capabilities, database operations, and web serving throughput. Uncached memory write bandwidth represents a relative performance tradeoff, scoring in the bottom 25%. With its balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and integrated high-speed local storage, this instance is designed for database workloads, web serving, text processing, and general-purpose applications requiring fast local disk access.

tagline: An x86_64 general-purpose instance featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors, balanced memory density, and integrated local NVMe SSD storage.
